user.title: Recorder Tuning
user.description:
Configure the daily entity purge schedule and short-term statistics retention. Purge rules are defined in recorder_tuning.yaml in the HA config directory.

Dry-run mode is enabled by default. In dry-run mode the integration logs exactly what it would delete without removing any data. Disable it once you have reviewed the logs and are satisfied with your rules.

data.dry_run: Dry-run mode (log only, do not delete)

data_description.purge_time: Time of day to run per-entity purge rules. Example: 03:00
data_description.stats_keep_days: How many days of 5-minute statistics to retain. Must be >= your recorder purge_keep_days.
data_description.dry_run: When enabled, every purge run (scheduled and manual) logs what would be deleted without touching any data. Disable once you have confirmed the rules are correct.

error.invalid_time: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g. 03:00).

menu.title: Recorder Tuning
menu.description:
Rules are defined in recorder_tuning.yaml. Call the recorder_tuning.reload service after editing that file.

Dry-run mode: {dry_run}

data_description.stats_keep_days: Days of 5-minute statistics to retain. Set higher than recorder purge_keep_days to decouple state history from statistics retention.

set_dry_run.title: Dry-Run Mode
set_dry_run.description: When dry-run mode is ON, every purge run (scheduled and manual) logs what would be deleted without removing any data. Turn it OFF once you have reviewed the logs and confirmed your rules are correct.

data.dry_run: Dry-run mode (log only, do not delete)

error.invalid_time: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g. 03:00).
